note: All debut-volume manga (no light novels) releasing this month and next per otakucalendar.com, ranked against your collection. Covers link to Barnes & Noble.

items.t: The Drops of God: New World, Vol. 1
items.why: Contemporary artsy seinen that is exactly your top lane — the legendary wine drama returns in a fresh entry point.
items.url: https://www.barnesandnoble.com/s/The Drops of God New World

items.why: Masaaki Nakayama's landmark J-horror shorts finally in print — quiet, creeping dread in the vein of The Summer Hikaru Died.
VIZ original with real artistic ambition — anti-imperialist epic with religious horror and queer heart, an artsy swing like Blue Period.
VIZ Shonen Jump slice-of-life romcom — right in the Skip and Loafer pocket you already love.
A baseball BL with a catcher/pitcher love triangle — sports manga is your lane and the story earns its spot.
New romance from Io Sakisaka (Ao Haru Ride) — gentle anxious-crush shojo, VIZ pedigree.

items.t: I'm Fine With Being the Second Girlfriend, Vol. 1
items.meta: Jul 14 · Seven Seas · romance drama ecchi
items.why: Messy settling-for-second romance drama with an ecchi edge — hits your romcom/ecchi streak.
items.url: https://www.barnesandnoble.com/s/Im Fine With Being the Second Girlfriend

items.why: A grounded medical-drama seinen from Morning two — more craft than the average fantasy debut.
Cozy fox-and-rabbit iyashikei — a Days on Fes-adjacent low-key hangout read.

items.t: You Might As Well Be the One, Vol. 1
items.why: Understated college romcom about being liked for who you are — worth a look if the slice-of-life shelf has room.
items.url: https://www.barnesandnoble.com/s/You Might As Well Be the One

items.why: Chimera-and-human shojo fantasy — fine art but outside your usual lane.

items.t: The Bubble Love of the Mermaid, Vol. 1
items.why: My Happy Marriage creator's new romantic fantasy — only if that flavor calls to you.
items.url: https://www.barnesandnoble.com/s/The Bubble Love of the Mermaid

items.meta: Aug 4 · Manga UP! · josei fantasy romance
items.why: Role-reversal royal romance — charming premise but not a core fit.

items.t: Mistress Kanan is Devilishly Easy, Omnibus Vol. 1-2
items.why: Ghost Ship ecchi romcom omnibus — scratches the ecchi itch, nothing more.

items.t: Magic Doctor Rex's Perverted Medical Record, Vol. 1
items.why: Ecchi gag fantasy — only if you're in the mood for it.
items.url: https://www.barnesandnoble.com/s/Magic Doctor Rex Perverted Medical Record

items.t: Marriage to the Wolf: An Interspecies Union, Vol. 1
items.why: Interspecies romance fantasy — mild fit, browse before buying.
items.url: https://www.barnesandnoble.com/s/Marriage to the Wolf An Interspecies Union

items.why: The Solo Leveling sequel comic — slick action but the leveling-power genre isn't really your thing.

items.t: History of the Kingdom of Orcsen, Vol. 1
items.why: Orcish nation-building isekai — near the bottom of your interests.
items.url: https://www.barnesandnoble.com/s/History of the Kingdom of Orcsen

items.t: Not Your Typical Reincarnation Story, Vol. 1
items.why: Another reincarnation isekai — not your lane despite the title's promise.
